subject: A tall angular tower structure radiating bright prismatic light upward and outward, depicted as a Stadium location card
description: A tall structure or tower is centered in the frame, rendered in a stylized manner with bright radiating light bursting outward and upward from it. The light has a prismatic or rainbow quality, with streaks of green, white, and blue-white energy. The card is oriented upside-down in one half, reflecting its dual-facing Stadium mechanic — the text and image read differently from each side. The tower itself is angular and geometric. The overall effect is one of overwhelming energy or power emanating from a central architectural point.
foreground: angular tower structure with radiating prismatic light beams
background: dark gradient with radiating energy lines
